description: Julong Holding Limited provides intelligent integrated services and solutions to various infrastructure projects in China. The company offers intelligent integrated solutions, such as intelligent security systems, fire protection systems, parking systems, toll collection systems, broadcasting systems, identification systems, data room systems, emergency command systems, and city management systems.
